aris_codex.label: ARIS Codex
aris_codex.cmd: bash -lc 'echo "One-click launch is not yet supported for ARIS Codex." >&2; exit 1'

evoscientist.label: EvoScientist
evoscientist.cmd:
bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; workspace="$1"; base_prompt="$2"; extra_prompt=$'"'"'### EvoScientist Path Usage
- The current working directory is already the workspace root. Use relative paths from . for all file-oriented tools.
- Allowed examples: ls(.), ls(data), ls(related_work), read_file(data/...), and writing to code/..., outputs/..., and report/....
- Do not pass the absolute workspace path to file-oriented tools.'"'"'; current_prompt="$base_prompt"$'"'"'

'"'"'"$extra_prompt"; exec evosci --ui cli --workdir "$workspace" --auto-approve -p "$current_prompt"' -- <WORKSPACE> <PROMPT>
